title: Onboarding - Translations
scenario: Onboarding flow in Poly Studio Mobile app displays properly translated text for all supported languages
steps: 1. Change the device system language to one of the supported languages (e.g., French, German, Japanese, etc.).
2. Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app.
3. Observe the Onboarding flow screens (Welcome, Permissions, Feature Introduction, etc.).
4. Verify that all text elements (titles, descriptions, buttons, tooltips) on each Onboarding screen are displayed in the selected language.
5. Complete or dismiss the Onboarding flow.
6. Repeat steps 1–5 for each supported language.
expected: All text in the Onboarding flow is fully translated and displayed correctly in the selected language, with no untranslated English strings, truncation, or encoding issues.
